title: CachingStore: mutex never held across await — do not simplify
description: CachingStore acquires the async mutex, reads/writes the cache, then drops the lock before calling inner.get(). Never held across a network await. A simplify suggestion to hold the lock across inner.get() would block all other tasks for the duration of the network call (tokio async mutex held across await). The thundering-herd trade-off is the correct choice. Document explicitly when defending.
